sparkling.name: Domaine Jean Collet & Fils Cremant de Bourgogne Brut
sparkling.description: Crisp, dry, and elegant. High acidity with notes of green apple, citrus, and subtle brioche. Light body.

sparkling.name: Champagne Pierre Peters Blanc de Blancs
sparkling.description: 100% Chardonnay. Razor-sharp acidity, bone dry, light body. Crisp minerality with lemon zest and green apple.

sparkling.name: Stødig Rosésider Eple&Bringebær fra Lien gård (alkoholfri)
sparkling.description: Non-alcoholic cider. Fresh, fruit-forward with vibrant raspberry and apple notes. Crisp acidity, off-dry.

white.name: Acham-Magin Riesling Trocken
white.description: Dry Riesling. High bracing acidity, light body. Crisp and aromatic with notes of lime, green apple, and slate.

white.name: Domaine E. Guigal Côtes du Rhone Blanc
white.description: Côtes du Rhône Blanc. Low acidity, dry, full body. Rich and aromatic with apricot, honeysuckle, and melon.

white.name: Rafael Palacios Godello
white.description: Godello. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Waxy texture with lemon zest, peach, and crushed rocks.

white.name: Francois Carillon Cap au Sud Chardonnay
white.description: Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant oak integration, hazelnut, and citrus.

white.name: Chavy Chouet Aligoté
white.description: High zesty acidity, light body, bone dry. Crisp green apple, lemon, and a saline finish.

white.name: Dominique Lafon Bourgogne Blanc
white.description: Bourgogne Blanc. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Subtle oak nuance, vibrant orchard fruit, and tension.

red.name: Château Camino Salva
red.description: A wonderful selection from our cellar. Ask your sommelier for detailed tasting notes.

red.name: E. Pira di Chiara Boschis Dolcetto Alba
red.description: Dolcetto/Barolo. High acidity, dry, full body. Powerful tannins (Barolo) or juicy black fruit (Dolcetto).

red.name: Reynaud Crozes-Hermitage Beaumont
red.description: Crozes-Hermitage (Syrah). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Moderate tannins, notes of blackberry, olive, and black pepper.

red.name: Cavalotto Langhe Nebbiolo
red.description: Nebbiolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Grippy, formidable tannins with notes of tar, roses, and dried cherry.

red.name: Glantenay Bourgogne Côte d'Or
red.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Fine tannins with notes of red cherry, raspberry, and earth.

sweet.name: Selbach Oster Zeltinger Auslese
sweet.description: Riesling Auslese. High acidity, sweet, medium body. Lush and honeyed with notes of apricot, mango, and offset by vibrant acidity.

england.name: Culver Classic Cuvée
england.description: Classic Cuvée. Crisp acidity, dry, medium-light body. Orchard fruit, biscuit, and a fine mousse.

france_champagne.name: Brut Grand Cru
france_champagne.description: Grand Cru Champagne. High acidity, bone dry, medium body. Complex layers of toasted almond, citrus, and chalk.

france_champagne.name: Oeil de Perdrix
france_champagne.description: Oeil de Perdrix (Blanc de Noirs). Medium acidity, dry, medium body. Red berry notes with a creamy texture.

france_champagne.name: L'Atavique Verzy Grand Cru Extra Brut
france_champagne.description: Extra Brut. Very dry, high acidity, medium body. Intense minerality with notes of orchard fruit and toast.

france_champagne.name: Platine 1er Cru Brut
france_champagne.description: 1er Cru Brut. Crisp acidity, dry, medium body. Rich texture with toasted brioche and ripe apple.

france_champagne.name: Blanc de Blancs Cuvée Réservée
france_champagne.description: 100% Chardonnay. Razor-sharp acidity, bone dry, light body. Crisp minerality with lemon zest and green apple.

france_champagne.name: Blanc de Blancs Cuvée Réservée MAG
france_champagne.description: 100% Chardonnay. Razor-sharp acidity, bone dry, light body. Crisp minerality with lemon zest and green apple.

france_champagne.name: Grain d'Argile Extra Brut
france_champagne.description: Extra Brut. Bone dry, high electric acidity. Precise and focused with lemon curd and chalky minerality.

france_champagne.name: Blanc de Noirs Brut
france_champagne.description: Blanc de Noirs. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Rich red fruit character with a vinous texture.

france_champagne.name: Reminiscence Pinot Blanc
france_champagne.description: Pinot Blanc. Medium acidity, dry, light-medium body. Floral notes, white peach, and a soft, rounded finish.

france_champagne.name: Grain de Celles
france_champagne.description: Dry, crisp acidity, medium body. Expressive aromatics of white flowers and citrus with a mineral core.

france_champagne.name: Les Grandes Côtes Pinot Noir
france_champagne.description: Dry, crisp acidity, medium body. Expressive aromatics of white flowers and citrus with a mineral core.

france_champagne.name: Grain de Celles Rosé
france_champagne.description: Dry, crisp acidity, medium body. Expressive aromatics of white flowers and citrus with a mineral core.

france_champagne.name: Zero Brut Nature
france_champagne.description: Zero Brut Nature. Bone dry, very high acidity, medium body. Austere and precise with lemon peel and flint.

other_france.name: Cremant de Bourgogne Brut
other_france.description: A wonderful selection from our cellar. Ask your sommelier for detailed tasting notes.

other_france.name: Perle Sauvage Petillant Naturel
other_france.description: Pet-Nat. Refreshing acidity, very dry, light body. Hazy and vibrant with notes of pear, green apple, and yeast.

germany.name: Cuvee No. 103 Brut Nature Sekt
germany.description: Sekt Brut Nature. Bone dry, high acidity, medium body. Clean and focused with fine bubbles and orchard fruit.

italia.name: Brut
italia.description: Trentodoc. High acidity, dry, medium body. Classic method sparkling with notes of golden apple, toast, and yeast.

italia.name: Perle Vintage
italia.description: Trentodoc. High acidity, dry, medium body. Classic method sparkling with notes of golden apple, toast, and yeast.

bordeaux.name: Loudenne Le Chateau Blanc
bordeaux.description: Bordeaux Blanc. Medium acidity, dry, medium body. Notes of grapefruit, white peach, and a touch of oak.

bourgogne_chablis.name: Chablis
bourgogne_chablis.description: Chablis. High electric acidity, bone dry, light-medium body. Flinty, steely minerality with green apple and lemon.

bourgogne_chablis.name: Chablis 1er Cru Les Vaillons
bourgogne_chablis.description: Chablis. High electric acidity, bone dry, light-medium body. Flinty, steely minerality with green apple and lemon.

bourgogne_chablis.name: Chablis Vaudesir Grand Cru
bourgogne_chablis.description: Chablis. High electric acidity, bone dry, light-medium body. Flinty, steely minerality with green apple and lemon.

bourgogne_chablis.name: Chablis La Butte 'O'
bourgogne_chablis.description: Chablis/Auxerre. Crisp high acidity, dry, light body. Pure, un-oaked Chardonnay with citrus and chalky focus.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Cotes d'Auxerre
bourgogne_other.description: Chablis/Auxerre. Crisp high acidity, dry, light body. Pure, un-oaked Chardonnay with citrus and chalky focus.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Aligoté
bourgogne_other.description: Aligoté/Chardonnay. Fresh acidity, dry, medium body. Floral and citrusy with a clean, mineral-driven finish.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Aligoté
bourgogne_other.description: Aligoté. High zesty acidity, bone dry, light body. Crisp green apple, lemon, and a saline finish.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne-Aligoté BG
bourgogne_other.description: Aligoté. High vibrant acidity, dry, light body. Tension-filled with notes of crunchy green apple and lemon zest.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne blanc Les Femelottes
bourgogne_other.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne blanc Les Femelottes MAG
bourgogne_other.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Tonnerre Les Huées
bourgogne_other.description: Chardonnay. Racy high acidity, dry, medium body. Mineral-driven with bright lemon and a saline edge.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Blanc Le Clos du Chateau
bourgogne_other.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant, reductive style with matchstick, citrus, and oak.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Blanc
bourgogne_other.description: Bourgogne Blanc. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Subtle oak nuance, vibrant orchard fruit, and tension.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Blanc
bourgogne_other.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and precise with notes of white peach and crushed rock.

bourgogne_other.name: Bourgogne Les Chataigners Blanc
bourgogne_other.description: White Burgundy. High nervous acidity, dry, medium body. Intense minerality, citrus peel, and a long finish.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Marsannay Blanc Aux Larrey
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Marsannay Blanc. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Floral aromas with citrus, peach, and a hint of spice.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Complex and textured with orchard fruit and minerality.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Monthelie 1er Cru Les Champs Fulliot
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. High precise acidity, dry, medium body. Racy and tense with lemon, hazelnut, and flawless balance.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Auxey-Duresses
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Rich yet focused with citrus, toast, and limestone.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Puligny-Montrachet
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, full body. Iconic, complex, and powerful with notes of honey, nuts, and citrus.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Meursault Clos des Corvees de Citeau
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Meursault. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Rich and buttery yet mineral-driven with hazelnut.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Meursault. High acidity, dry, full body. Reductive and taut in youth, unfurling to rich hazelnut and citrus.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Puligny-Montrachet 1er Cru Les Combettes
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant oak integration, hazelnut, and citrus.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Meursault Clos Saint Felix Monopol
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Meursault. Medium acidity, dry, full body. Classic rich Meursault with buttery, nutty, and baked apple notes.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Puligny-Montrachet. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant and floral with precise minerality.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Aligoté/Chardonnay. Fresh acidity, dry, medium body. Floral and citrusy with a clean, mineral-driven finish.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Broad and rich with notes of apricot and hazelnut.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Broad and rich with notes of apricot and hazelnut.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Opulent and textured with layers of fruit and oak.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Opulent and textured with layers of fruit and oak.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Chassagne-Montrachet
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant, pure, and mineral-driven with tension.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Chassagne-Montrachet 1er Cru Les Caillerets
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. High acidity, dry, medium body. Racy, focused, and steely with citrus and crushed rocks.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Chassagne Montrachet Les Mazures
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Chassagne-Montrachet. High acidity, dry, medium body. Racy, focused, and steely with citrus and crushed rocks.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Santenay 1er Cru Clos des Gravieres
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. High nervous acidity, dry, medium body. Intense minerality, citrus peel, and a long finish.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Saint Aubin Village
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Saint-Aubin. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and mineral with notes of green apple and lemon.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Saint-Aubin 1er Cru Le Champlot
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Saint-Aubin. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and mineral with notes of green apple and lemon.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Saint-Aubin 1er Cru En Remilly
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: Saint-Aubin. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and mineral with notes of green apple and lemon.

cote_de_beaune_nuits.name: Corton-Charlemagne Grand Cru
cote_de_beaune_nuits.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant, reductive style with matchstick, citrus, and oak.

maconnais.name: Clos De La Crochette
maconnais.description: Mâconnais. Medium acidity, dry, medium-full body. Ripe tropical fruit, peach, and a rounded mouthfeel.

maconnais.name: Macon-Verzé
maconnais.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, full body. Iconic, complex, and powerful with notes of honey, nuts, and citrus.

maconnais.name: Pouilly-Fuisse
maconnais.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, full body. Iconic, complex, and powerful with notes of honey, nuts, and citrus.

maconnais.name: Saint-Véran Les Cras
maconnais.description: Mâconnais. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Vibrant and fruity with citrus, melon, and floral notes.

maconnais.name: VDF Chef un P'tit Vert
maconnais.description: Mâconnais. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Vibrant and fruity with citrus, melon, and floral notes.

jura.name: Côtes du Jura Chardonnay VV
jura.description: Jura Chardonnay. High electric acidity, dry, medium body. Oxidative hint with notes of bruised apple and hazelnut.

jura.name: L'ètoile
jura.description: L'Étoile. High acidity, dry, medium body. Classic Jura style, slightly oxidative with walnut and flor notes.

jura.name: Arbois Chardonnay
jura.description: Arbois Chardonnay. High acidity, dry, medium body. Pristine and reductive with lemon peel and flint.

loire.name: Saumur Blanc
loire.description: Saumur Blanc (Chenin Blanc). High acidity, dry, medium body. Notes of quince, wet wool, and chamomile.

loire.name: Sancerre
loire.description: Sancerre (Sauvignon Blanc). High racy acidity, bone dry, light body. Grassy, flinty, with gooseberry and citrus.

loire.name: Muscadet Theia
loire.description: Muscadet. High acidity, bone dry, light body. Saline and crisp with notes of lemon, sea spray, and lees.

loire.name: Pouilly-Fumé Triptyque
loire.description: Pouilly-Fumé. High acidity, dry, light-medium body. Smoky flint, grapefruit, and herbaceous notes.

rhone.name: Crozes-Hermitage Aux Bétises
rhone.description: Northern Rhône Syrah. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Supple tannins, biodynamic, with vibrant blackberry and pepper.

rhone.name: Côtes du Rhone Blanc
rhone.description: Côtes du Rhône Blanc. Low acidity, dry, full body. Rich and aromatic with apricot, honeysuckle, and melon.

languedoc.name: Cap au sud Chardonnay VDF
languedoc.description: Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant oak integration, hazelnut, and citrus.

england.name: Chardonnay
england.description: English Chardonnay. High acidity, dry, medium body. Crisp and elegant with notes of green apple and subtle oak.

italia.name: Chardonnay
italia.description: Trentino Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Clean and fruity with notes of apple and white peach.

italia.name: Etna Bianco
italia.description: Etna Bianco. High acidity, bone dry, medium body. Intense volcanic minerality with notes of lemon and sea salt.

spania.name: Louro
spania.description: Godello. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Waxy texture with lemon zest, peach, and crushed rocks.

spania.name: As Sortes
spania.description: Godello. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Waxy texture with lemon zest, peach, and crushed rocks.

spania.name: Credo Aloers (skallkontakt)
spania.description: Xarel-lo. High acidity, dry, medium body. Textured with skin contact, notes of fennel, citrus, and herbs.

germany.name: Riesling Trocken
germany.description: Mosel Riesling. Very high acidity, dry, light-medium body. Intense slate minerality, lime, and white peach.

germany.name: Marienburg Fahrlay GG
germany.description: Mosel Riesling. Very high acidity, dry, light-medium body. Intense slate minerality, lime, and white peach.

germany.name: Tonschiefer Riesling Trocken
germany.description: Nahe Riesling. High elegant acidity, dry, medium body. Pristine and pure with notes of citrus, flint, and apricot.

germany.name: Hollenpfad Riesling Trocken Erste Lage
germany.description: Nahe Riesling. High elegant acidity, dry, medium body. Pristine and pure with notes of citrus, flint, and apricot.

germany.name: Stromberg Riesling GG
germany.description: Nahe Riesling. Extreme high acidity, dry, medium body. Spontaneous fermentation notes, flint, and intense citrus.

germany.name: Felseneck Riesling GG
germany.description: Nahe Riesling. Extreme high acidity, dry, medium body. Spontaneous fermentation notes, flint, and intense citrus.

germany.name: Riesling Trocken
germany.description: Dry Riesling. High bracing acidity, light body. Crisp and aromatic with notes of lime, green apple, and slate.

germany.name: Forster Ungeheuer Riesling GG
germany.description: Dry Riesling. High bracing acidity, light body. Crisp and aromatic with notes of lime, green apple, and slate.

germany.name: Wachenheimer Riesling Trocken
germany.description: Pfalz Riesling. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Powerful and structured with ripe peach and earthy minerality.

germany.name: Paradisergarten Riesling Trocken
germany.description: Pfalz Riesling. High acidity, dry, medium body. Juicy and fruit-forward with notes of nectarine and citrus.

usa.name: Santa Barbara
usa.description: California Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant, Burgundian style with bright fruit and subtle oak.

usa.name: Santa Barbara Count Chardonnay
usa.description: California Chardonnay. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and saline with notes of lemon rind and crushed shells.

bottles_rose.name: Miraval Rosé
bottles_rose.description: Rosé. Medium-high acidity, dry, light-medium body. Crisp and pale with notes of wild strawberry, peach, and white flowers.

bordeaux.name: Chateau Camino Salva
bordeaux.description: Bordeaux Blend. Medium acidity, dry, medium-full body. Firm tannins with notes of cassis, cedar, and graphite.

bordeaux.name: Chateau Lanessan
bordeaux.description: Bordeaux Blend. Medium acidity, dry, medium-full body. Resolved tannins with mature notes of leather, tobacco, and plum.

bordeaux.name: Le Petit Ducru Beaucaillou
bordeaux.description: Bordeaux Blend. Medium acidity, dry, full body. Silky tannins with concentrated blackberry and spice.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge La Taupe
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge La Taupe MAG
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Crunchy red fruit, light tannins, and a fresh finish.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge Maison Dieu
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Fine tannins with notes of red cherry, raspberry, and earth.

bourgogne_regional.name: Rully Rouge
bourgogne_regional.description: Rully Rouge. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Supple tannins with notes of wild strawberry and spice.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge Les Veuillots Inox
bourgogne_regional.description: Chardonnay. Racy high acidity, dry, medium body. Mineral-driven with bright lemon and a saline edge.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Earthy and structured with dark cherry and fine tannins.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge
bourgogne_regional.description: White Burgundy. High acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant, reductive style with matchstick, citrus, and oak.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge Les Cras
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Juicy and approachable with bright red fruit and soft tannins.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge Côte d'Or Sélection
bourgogne_regional.description: Marsannay Blanc. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Floral aromas with citrus, peach, and a hint of spice.

bourgogne_regional.name: Bourgogne Rouge En Gerlieus
bourgogne_regional.description: Pinot Noir. High acidity, dry, medium body. Tense and vibrant with crunchy red fruit and floral notes.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Marsannay Les Quartiers
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Classic forest floor, cherry, and silky tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Vosne-Romanée Aux Réas
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Perfumed and elegant with notes of violet, spice, and red fruit.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Nuits-Saint-Georges Vieilles Vignes
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Structured and earthy with dark fruit and fine tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Chambolle-Musigny
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Plush and textured with rich black cherry and spice.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Chambolle Musigny 1er Cru Combottes
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Iconic, structured, and complex with intense floral and fruit notes.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Gevrey-Chambertin Vieilles Vignes
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Earthy, structured Gevrey with firm tannins and dark fruit.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Vosne Romanée
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Incredibly elegant and perfumed with silky tannins and pure red fruit.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Vosne Romanée
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Incredibly elegant and perfumed with silky tannins and pure red fruit.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Clos Vougeot Grand Cru
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir Grand Cru. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Powerful and structured with dark fruit, earth, and firm tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Clos De La Roche Grand Cru
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir Grand Cru. Medium-high acidity, dry, full body. Powerful and structured with dark fruit, earth, and firm tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Volnay
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Fine tannins with notes of red cherry, raspberry, and earth.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Pommard
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Fine tannins with notes of red cherry, raspberry, and earth.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Savigny-lès-Beaune
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Approachable and pure with notes of red cherry and spice.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Beaune Epenottes
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Meursault. High acidity, dry, full body. Reductive and taut in youth, unfurling to rich hazelnut and citrus.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Monthélie Les Trois Climats
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Rustic and earthy with notes of red currant and firm tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Monthélie 1er Cru Les Champs Fuillot
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Rustic and earthy with notes of red currant and firm tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Chassagne-Montrachet Rouge 'Camps de Morgeot'
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Structured and spicy with notes of dark cherry and underbrush.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Pommard 1er Cru Clos Orgelot
bourgogne_village_cru.description: White Burgundy. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Complex and textured with orchard fruit and minerality.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Saint-Romain Rouge
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant and mineral-driven with crunchy red fruit.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Santenay 1er Cru Maladière
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Earthy and structured with dark cherry and fine tannins.

bourgogne_village_cru.name: Santenay Charmes Rouge
bourgogne_village_cru.description: Pinot Noir. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Earthy and structured with dark cherry and fine tannins.

beaujolais.name: Beaujolais-Villages Vieilles Vignes
beaujolais.description: Gamay. High acidity, dry, light-medium body. Low tannins, juicy and whole-cluster driven with notes of red berry and violet.

beaujolais.name: Beaujolais-Villages La Sambinerie
beaujolais.description: Gamay. High acidity, dry, light-medium body. Soft tannins, highly drinkable with notes of crushed strawberry and granite.

jura.name: Arbois Pinot Noir Clos Saint-Laurent
jura.description: Arbois Chardonnay. High acidity, dry, medium body. Pristine and reductive with lemon peel and flint.

loire.name: Statera Rouge
loire.description: Loire Rouge. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Fresh and crunchy with peppery spice and red fruit.

rhone.name: Crozes-Hermitage
rhone.description: Crozes-Hermitage (Syrah). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Firm tannins, savory with notes of olive, meat, and black pepper.

rhone.name: Saint-Joseph Rouge
rhone.description: Saint-Joseph (Syrah). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Granitic minerality, dark fruit, and smoked meat.

rhone.name: Crozes-Hermitage Beaumont
rhone.description: Northern Rhône Syrah. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Supple tannins, biodynamic, with vibrant blackberry and pepper.

rhone.name: Saint-Joseph 350m
rhone.description: Northern Rhône Syrah. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Supple tannins, biodynamic, with vibrant blackberry and pepper.

rhone.name: Crozes-Hermitage Les Croix
rhone.description: Northern Rhône Syrah. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Supple tannins, biodynamic, with vibrant blackberry and pepper.

rhone.name: No Wines Land
rhone.description: Northern Rhône Syrah. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Pure and unoaked, bursting with juicy dark fruit and violet.

rhone.name: La Pialade
rhone.description: Southern Rhône Blend. Medium acidity, dry, medium-full body. Legendary and ethereal with notes of kirsch, garrigue, and exotic spice.

piemonte.name: Barbera d'Alba Sori del Drago
piemonte.description: Barbera. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Low tannins, rich and juicy with notes of dark cherry, plum, and spice.

piemonte.name: Barbera d 'Alba
piemonte.description: Barbera. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Polished and elegant, bursting with ripe red and black fruit.

piemonte.name: Langhe Nebbiolo
piemonte.description: Nebbiolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Grippy, formidable tannins with notes of tar, roses, and dried cherry.

piemonte.name: Dolcetto d'Alba
piemonte.description: Dolcetto/Barolo. High acidity, dry, full body. Powerful tannins (Barolo) or juicy black fruit (Dolcetto).

piemonte.name: Barolo Via Nuova
piemonte.description: Dolcetto/Barolo. High acidity, dry, full body. Powerful tannins (Barolo) or juicy black fruit (Dolcetto).

piemonte.name: Barbera D'Alba Superiore
piemonte.description: Barbera/Nebbiolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Modern style, plush fruit, and integrated oak.

piemonte.name: Langhe Nebbiolo
piemonte.description: Barbera/Nebbiolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Modern style, plush fruit, and integrated oak.

piemonte.name: Barbaresco Asili
piemonte.description: Barbaresco (Nebbiolo). High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Firm tannins with notes of dried rose, cherry, and tar.

piemonte.name: Ghemme Oltre il Bosco
piemonte.description: Ghemme (Nebbiolo). High acidity, dry, medium body. Firm tannins, earthy and rustic with notes of dried fruit and leather.

piemonte.name: Langhe Nebbiolo
piemonte.description: Nebbiolo/Barolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant and perfumed with firm tannins, red cherry, and floral notes.

piemonte.name: Barolo Coste di Rose
piemonte.description: Nebbiolo/Barolo. High acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant and perfumed with firm tannins, red cherry, and floral notes.

piemonte.name: Cascina Ferrero Barolo
piemonte.description: Barolo. High acidity, dry, full body. Grippy tannins, structured with notes of tar, roses, and spice.

toscana.name: Rosso di Montalcino
toscana.description: Sangiovese. High acidity, dry, medium body. Firm tannins with notes of sour cherry, leather, and earth.

toscana.name: Mediterra
toscana.description: Super Tuscan Blend. Medium acidity, dry, full body. Rich and modern with plush dark fruit, mocha, and smooth tannins.

toscana.name: Chianti Classico
toscana.description: Chianti Classico (Sangiovese). High acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant and traditional with notes of red cherry and dried herbs.

toscana.name: Chianti Rufina Vigneto Erchi
toscana.description: Chianti Rufina (Sangiovese). High acidity, dry, medium body. Firm, dusty tannins with notes of tart cherry and cedar.

toscana.name: Bucerchiale Chianti Rufina Riserva
toscana.description: Chianti Rufina (Sangiovese). High acidity, dry, medium body. Firm, dusty tannins with notes of tart cherry and cedar.

toscana.name: Bucerchiale Chianti Rufina Riserva
toscana.description: Chianti Rufina (Sangiovese). High acidity, dry, medium body. Firm, dusty tannins with notes of tart cherry and cedar.

toscana.name: Brunello di Montalcino
toscana.description: Brunello (Sangiovese). High acidity, dry, full body. Powerful tannins, complex with notes of dried cherry, leather, and tobacco.

spania.name: Reserva
spania.description: Rioja (Tempranillo). Medium acidity, dry, full body. Firm tannins, traditional style with notes of dark fruit, dill, and vanilla oak.

spania.name: Mencía
spania.description: Mencía. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Light tannins, fresh and mineral with notes of red berries and crushed rocks.

spania.name: La Bruja
spania.description: Garnacha. High acidity, dry, light-medium body. Ethereal and pale, reminiscent of Pinot Noir, with wild strawberry and herbs.

spania.name: La Pilosa
spania.description: Garnacha. Medium acidity, dry, medium body. Juicy and fruit-forward with soft tannins and red plum notes.

portugal.name: Palhete
portugal.description: Portuguese Red. Medium acidity, dry, medium body. Rustic and authentic with dark fruit and earthy spice.

germany.name: Kalkmergel Spätburgunder
germany.description: Spätburgunder (Pinot Noir). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant oak integration, cherry, and forest floor.

germany.name: Kirschgarten Spätburgunder
germany.description: Spätburgunder (Pinot Noir). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Elegant oak integration, cherry, and forest floor.

germany.name: Ingelheim Spätburgunder
germany.description: Spätburgunder (Pinot Noir). Medium-high acidity, dry, medium body. Pure and precise with crunchy red fruit and fine tannins.

usa.name: Santa Rita Hills Pinot Noir
usa.description: California Chardonnay. Medium-high acidity, dry, medium-full body. Elegant, Burgundian style with bright fruit and subtle oak.

usa.name: Submarine canyon Pinot Noir
usa.description: California Pinot Noir. Medium acidity, dry, medium body. Bright and juicy with notes of ripe cherry, cola, and spice.

dessert_wine.name: Riveyrac vin doux Naturel
dessert_wine.description: Vin Doux Naturel. Medium acidity, sweet, full body. Fortified and oxidized with notes of raisin, fig, caramel, and walnut.

dessert_wine.name: Brachetto d'Aqui Pineto
dessert_wine.description: Brachetto. Medium acidity, sweet, light body. Lightly sparkling with intense notes of fresh strawberry and rose petal.

dessert_wine.name: Zeltinger Zonnenuhr Auslese
dessert_wine.description: Riesling Auslese. High acidity, sweet, medium body. Lush and honeyed with notes of apricot, mango, and offset by vibrant acidity.

dessert_wine.name: Imperial Szamorodni
dessert_wine.description: Szamorodni. High acidity, sweet, full body. Complex botrytis notes of marmalade, honey, and dried apricot.
